extracted_info.title: Public Law 117-169: To provide for reconciliation pursuant to title II of S. Con. Res. 14
extracted_info.affected_sectors: Corporations (other than S corporations, regulated investment companies, or real estate investment trusts) with average annual adjusted financial statement income exceeding $1 billion or $100 million
key_requirements: Imposition of a 15% alternative minimum tax on applicable corporations' adjusted financial statement income, with an offset for foreign tax credits
Definition of 'applicable corporation' based on average annual adjusted financial statement income thresholds
Exceptions for corporations with certain ownership changes or losses
